# Automaticly generated by wsjcpp@v0.2.7
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.18)

add_definitions(-DWSJCPP_APP_VERSION="v0.0.1")
add_definitions(-DWSJCPP_APP_NAME="my-little-dev-lab")

if (${CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME} MATCHES "Darwin")
    set(MACOSX TRUE)
endif()

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)

set (WSJCPP_LIBRARIES "")
set (WSJCPP_INCLUDE_DIRS "")
set (WSJCPP_SOURCES "")

find_package(Threads REQUIRED)
list (APPEND WSJCPP_LIBRARIES ${CMAKE_THREAD_LIBS_INIT})

# wsjcpp-core:v0.2.3
list (APPEND WSJCPP_INCLUDE_DIRS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_core/")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_core/wsjcpp_core.cpp")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_core/wsjcpp_core.h")

# HowardHinnant/date:v2.4.1
list (APPEND WSJCPP_INCLUDE_DIRS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/HowardHinnant_date/")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/HowardHinnant_date/date.h")

# wsjcpp-yaml:v0.1.10
list (APPEND WSJCPP_INCLUDE_DIRS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_yaml/")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_yaml/wsjcpp_yaml.cpp")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_yaml/wsjcpp_yaml.h")

# wsjcpp-validators:v0.1.3
list (APPEND WSJCPP_INCLUDE_DIRS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_validators/")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_validators/wsjcpp_validators.h")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_validators/wsjcpp_validators.cpp")

# wsjcpp-employees:v0.1.3
list (APPEND WSJCPP_INCLUDE_DIRS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_employees/")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_employees/wsjcpp_employees.h")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_employees/wsjcpp_employees.cpp")

# wsjcpp-arguments:v0.2.1
list (APPEND WSJCPP_INCLUDE_DIRS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_arguments/")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_arguments/wsjcpp_arguments.cpp")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_arguments/wsjcpp_arguments.h")

# wsjcpp-user-session:v1.0.0
list (APPEND WSJCPP_INCLUDE_DIRS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_user_session/")

# nlohmann/json:v3.12.0
list (APPEND WSJCPP_INCLUDE_DIRS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/nlohmann_json/")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/nlohmann_json/nlohmann/json.hpp")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/nlohmann_json/nlohmann/json_fwd.hpp")

# wsjcpp-jsonrpc20:v0.0.5
list (APPEND WSJCPP_INCLUDE_DIRS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_jsonrpc20/")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_jsonrpc20/wsjcpp_jsonrpc20.h")

list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_jsonrpc20/wsjcpp_jsonrpc20_export_cli_python.cpp")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_jsonrpc20/wsjcpp_jsonrpc20_export_cli_webjs.h")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_jsonrpc20/wsjcpp_jsonrpc20_export_cli_webjs.cpp")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_jsonrpc20/wsjcpp_jsonrpc20_export_cli_base.h")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/./src.wsjcpp/wsjcpp_jsonrpc20/wsjcpp_jsonrpc20_export_cli_base.cpp")

# resources.wsjcpp
list (APPEND WSJCPP_INCLUDE_DIRS "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/wsjcpp_resources/")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/wsjcpp_resources/__data_html_index_html_pathffd2bc.h")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/wsjcpp_resources/__data_html_index_html_pathffd2bc.cpp")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/wsjcpp_resources/__data_html_admin_index_html_path5f17ec.h")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_SOURCES "${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/wsjcpp_resources/__data_html_admin_index_html_path5f17ec.cpp")

# required-libraries
list (APPEND WSJCPP_LIBRARIES "-lpthread")
list (APPEND WSJCPP_LIBRARIES "-lpthread")
